MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney to appear on April 21, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why a response to the Probate Examiner's notes has not been filed and why they failed to appear. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Leonardini. (Not Reported)
